_codex_staging.notes: Johnson & Johnson transcript source research deposit for FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026. Official IR vendor-linked transcript PDFs were identified or pattern-matched in prior handoff. Structured StockAnalysis rows are included as readable transcript fallbacks pending direct PDF validation.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.

coverage_summary.primary_structured_source: StockAnalysis transcript pages with official JNJ PDF context
coverage_summary.official_source_context: JNJ IR-linked Q4 CDN transcript PDFs; StockAnalysis structured fallback
coverage_summary.human_review_reason: Official PDF candidates require spot-checking for HTTP status, PDF type, quarter/date match, transcript text, and Q&A.
